candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total for current assets; directly matches ACT definition.
Balancing/helper line, not the reported total; less suitable than the clean total line.
Wrong section; not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash line; best match for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow closing cash line, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not the balance-sheet cash stock for period-end mapping.

candidates.row_label: Net increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Flow, not stock.
Not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Adjustments for non-cash transactions - Balancing value
candidates.why: Not cash balance.
Exact total current liabilities line; directly matches LCT.
Only a component/subtotal of current liabilities, not the full total.
Component, not total current liabilities.
Balancing/helper line rather than reported total.
Wrong section.
Wrong section and only a subtotal.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: This appears under current liabilities and likely represents current borrowings; preferred over lease-specific rows for baseline STD.
Could include debt, but is ambiguous and in some years appears to equal lease liabilities; less clean than Loans.
Debt-like label, but shown under current liabilities only as 0.0 in preview and also appears as non-current later; ambiguous as current portion.

candidates.row_label: Capital Lease Maturities - Due within 1 Year
candidates.why: Current debt-like maturity, but explicitly lease-related and should be excluded from baseline STD.
Explicit lease liabilities; excluded from baseline STD.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidates were provided. Chose 'Loans' as the cleanest non-lease current debt label on the balance sheet. Excluded lease-related rows per instructions and avoided ambiguous 'Other financial liabilities' because it overlaps with lease liabilities in some years.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: Exact tax-payable style current liability line.

candidates.why: Reported balance-sheet PPE line; best match for total/net property, plant and equipment.
Gross subcomponent/other category only, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Other - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset subcomponent, not PPE total.
Capex flow, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Proceeds from sale of tangible assets
candidates.why: Disposal flow, not PPE stock.

variables.notes: Used the clean balance-sheet PPE line. This is net PPE, which is preferred when gross total is not clearly available as a single total row.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.
Exact net operating cash flow line; best match for OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before financial and tax items
candidates.why: Pre-interest/pre-tax operating subtotal, not the final net operating cash flow when the latter exists.

variables.notes: Selected the final net operating cash flow line rather than the before-financial-and-tax subtotal.
